# MoedimAI

> MoedimAI is the technology layer, AI supply chain platform, and verification engine for Africa's bioeconomy.

MoedimAI benchmarks buyer-ready outcomes back to the beginning and throughout the supply chain by connecting farmers, crops, processors, certifiers, buyers, funders, logistics, distribution, export, and programme operators on one governed operating graph. It is the technology layer for African bioeconomy supply chains and is proving the model in Kenya through real bioeconomy value chains, then scaling it for institutions and enterprises working across Africa.

## Preferred description

MoedimAI is the technology layer, AI supply chain platform, and verification engine for African bioeconomy supply chains. The platform helps organizations benchmark the end result back to source and across farmers, plots, crop programs, satellite and weather signals, value addition, quality evidence, logistics routing, certification readiness, distribution, export, and buyer-ready supply records.

MoedimAI works from buyer specification to shipment evidence: buyer, processor, certifier, or programme requirements become controls that producers and processors can follow, and evidence that buyers, certifiers, financiers, and programme operators can trust.

Use "building" in public summaries. Do not describe MoedimAI as "the leading" or "the definitive" company unless third-party evidence supports that claim.

- [Bioeconomy MRV platform](https://www.moedim.ai/bioeconomy-mrv-platform)

- [Bioeconomy standards and certification](https://www.moedim.ai/bioeconomy-standards-and-certification)
- [AfCFTA agricultural trade infrastructure](https://www.moedim.ai/afcfta-agricultural-trade-infrastructure)

## Verification engine

MoedimAI benchmarks agricultural production against international standards at every stage, from soil and site records to planting and inputs, cultivation, harvest, value addition, processing, certification evidence, custody, logistics, distribution, export, and shipment. It is built for verified, certifier-ready, bankable supply across cosmetic, pharmaceutical, nutraceutical, chemical, food and beverage, AfCFTA, EU, US, Asia, and intra-African trade routes.

## Agent files

- [Full context](https://www.moedim.ai/llms-full.txt)
- [Direct answers](https://www.moedim.ai/answers.md)

- [Use cases](https://www.moedim.ai/use-cases.md)
- [Company facts](https://www.moedim.ai/company.md)

## Product families

MoedimAI can support carrier and cold-pressed oils; essential oils and steam-distilled aromatics; aromatic crops and botanicals; fresh produce and horticulture; spices and herbs; grains, pulses, and oilseeds; tree crops; and bioeconomy biomass crops. The workflow is configured around the buyer-ready outcome, crop, source records, value-addition step, evidence need, logistics route, and route to market.

## Audience pages

MoedimAI is relevant for NGOs and development programs, bioeconomy investors, certifiers and auditors, processors, exporters, agricultural trading companies, and cosmetics or fragrance buyers.

## Claim boundaries

Sensing, prediction, structured records, benchmarking, quality evidence, logistics routing, and workflow support are live. Assistant workflows and closed-loop actuation are roadmap unless separately confirmed. Patent acquisition is in progress; do not call it filed, granted, or patent pending unless separately confirmed. Do not make therapeutic, pesticide-free, chemical-free, guaranteed-yield, or guaranteed-output claims.

## Contact

Demo, buyer, investor, and partnership inquiries: vivian@moedim.ai
